notes: B3 backtest iteration: VPVR micro-reversion on 1h with funding-rate proxy filter.
VPVR construction: rolling 7d (168h) window builds a coarse 24-bin volume profile;
POC = price bin with peak volume; VAH/VAL = bins bracketing 70% of window volume.
Long entry: close < VAL (mean reversion up) AND funding proxy <= 0 (no long-funding drag).
Short entry: close > VAH (mean reversion down) AND funding proxy >= 0 (no short-funding drag).
Funding proxy is rolling 8h return since funding rate series is not in the canonical 1h parquet.
Exit first triggered wins: target to POC, stop-loss, take-profit, time stop.
